data_issues.description: latest_parcels and florida_parcels contain identical number of records (789,884)
data_issues.impact: Wasting storage, potential confusion in queries

data_issues.description: properties table only has 3 records while parcels have 789,884
data_issues.impact: Properties table may not be serving its intended purpose
data_issues.recommendation: Either migrate parcel data to properties or remove properties table
